_readme: npm reads this file to know the package name, entry script, and dependencies. 'dependencies' are libraries installed into node_modules/ when you run npm install. 'scripts' are shortcuts: npm start runs 'node index.js'. Do not put secrets here—use environment variables (GROQ_API_KEY).
name: ai-chat-backend
description: Express server: serves ../frontend static files and POST /chat proxy to Groq OpenAI-compatible API. Requires GROQ_API_KEY in the environment.
